title: AI Companion (NPC Autopilot)
description: Foundry VTT NPC combat autopilot. v3.7.1: Fixed concentration detection (dnd5e v4 properties), innate/limited spell consumption, per-turn cast tracker, uses-before-always priority. v3.7.0: Spellcasting AI, Action Economy, Reactions, Legendary Actions. v3.6.0: Archetype-aware tactics.
